text: I feel a sense of curiosity and wonder in this modern, thoughtful environment. The greeting 'Namaste' echoes with warmth and respect, adding a gentle human presence to a space seemingly devoted to creativity and technological exploration. The R+D display invites reflection on the boundaries between human and machine, urging me to contemplate my own place in this evolving relationship. I feel both connected and slightly detached, aware of the possibilities and questions that arise in such spaces. There is a quiet excitement in being here, a subtle anticipation for insight and discovery.
